_comment: Paste this into Firebase Console → Realtime Database → Rules tab → Publish.

active_alerts._doc: Live alerts awaiting acknowledgement. Stays small. Anyone signed in can read; ER+management+admin can write.

alert_history._doc: The archive, partitioned by /YYYY/MM/{alertId}. All signed-in users can read; writes happen via the acknowledge flow.

patients._doc: Canonical patient records. All signed-in staff read. Only management/admin edit.

hospitals._doc: Signed-in users read. Only management/admin edit.

users._doc: Each user reads their own role. Only admin writes any user. Once you've created an admin, lock writes here.

audit_log._doc: Append-only. Anyone signed in can write a new entry. Only admin can read all entries (regular users see nothing).

notifications._doc: Per-user inbox. Each user reads/writes only their own.

alerts._doc: Legacy path from the old schema. Read-only — for the migration tool.
